template.name: reconciliation_disbursement
template.description: Atomic reconciliation of a disbursement batch against the bank statement. Debits the Disbursement Payable (22100) rail obligation and credits the per-file Control (10102) account, zeroing both in a single posting. On the allocation ledger, debits Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) and credits Cash Balances - Control (11902), zeroing both. No suspense intermediary — unlike UC1 where clearing and control flushes are independent events, in UC2 both sides are known simultaneously when the recon engine identifies the match, so the reconciliation is atomic.

financial_statements_impact.description: Disbursement Payable (22100) is debited, zeroing the rail obligation on the house ledger.
Control (10102) is credited, zeroing the per-file bank statement staging balance on the house ledger.
Asset-to-asset reclassification on the allocation ledger: Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) is debited and Cash Balances - Control (11902) is credited, zeroing both FDIC reconciliation positions.

template.trigger: Recon engine matches an ACH disbursement batch against a bank statement line. Both the rail payable and control balances are known, so reconciliation is atomic — no suspense pass-through needed.

ledger_scope_descriptions.house: House ledger where the rail payable (22100) and per-file Control (10102) are zeroed out against each other.
ledger_scope_descriptions.allocation_ledger: Allocation ledger (ID 5002) where Cash Balances - Clearing and Cash Balances - Control are zeroed out for FDIC tracking.

accounting_treatments.description: Atomic reconciliation: zero the rail payable obligation directly against the bank statement control balance. No suspense intermediary.

account_code_validations.description: Disbursement Payable per payment rail (e.g. ACH, wire, PayPal); debited to zero out the rail obligation.
Bank statement control account (Master FBO - Control); credited to zero out the per-file bank statement staging balance.
Cash Balances - Clearing on the allocation ledger; debited to zero the clearing-side FDIC position.
Cash Balances - Control on the allocation ledger; credited to zero the control-side FDIC position.

payment_rail.description: Payment rail identifier (e.g. ACH, WIRE, PAYPAL) for audit trail.

variables.description: Static: Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) on allocation ledger.
variables.name: cash_balances_clearing

legs.description: Match the ACH batch obligation against the bank statement; both positions zero out atomically.
Mirror the reconciliation on the allocation ledger, zeroing both FDIC positions.

examples.name: recon_disbursement_500
examples.description: Reconcile $500.00 ACH disbursement: zero out rail payable (22100) against control (10102), and zero Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) against Cash Balances - Control (11902).
